学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, reflecting a steady improvement in the university's comprehensive strength; Ethnology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, which have no direct subject mapping with Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Class, Statistics Class, etc.), but the overall 985 level of the university still attracts science candidates; reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking 80th, rated 'average', short video exposure is moderate, with no significant abnormal fluctuations in application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication, Statistics Class, etc., are highly popular/recommended in society, with engineering majors having high popularity; the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 15,800 (+3.6%) compared to 440,200 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; the provincial control line for undergraduate batch in 2025 is 436 points, slightly lower than 442 points in 2024; Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application for Guangdong candidates; the university's Physics Category enrollment proportion in Guangdong is about 0.3%–0.5% (estimated), not a major source province, so regional preference impact is limited.

预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, a slight increase in Physics Category candidates in 2026 (+3.6%), a reduction in enrollment plan (-8.3%) easing competition, and the improvement in university level and high popularity of engineering majors, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is: predicted minimum ranking about 22572, range 22072–23072.
